summary: iOS | 5.0.1 | Free20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image missing from Home Screen after pairing Free20 and fresh installing production app from App Store
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen after pairing Free20 with the mobile and doing a fresh install of the production app from the App Store.
steps: 1. Pair Free20 headset with the mobile device.
2. Fresh install the production app from the App Store.
3. Open the app and navigate to the Home Screen.
4. Observe the headset image on the Home Screen.
expected: The headset image should be displayed on the Home Screen after pairing and fresh install.
actual: The headset image is missing from the Home Screen.
